text.title: brainstorming-techniques Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for brainstorming-techniques as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Skipping the convergence step after ideation — leaving participants with a list but no prioritization or owner assignments.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Ideas without owners and priorities evaporate. The session feels productive but produces no action, which destroys trust in future brainstorming sessions.
